chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Matters Related to Testimonies

text: 3364 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا دَفَنْتَ فِي اَلْأَرْضِ شَيْئاً فَأَشْهِدْ عَلَيْهَا فَإِنَّهَا لاَ تُؤَدِّي إِلَيْكَ شَيْئاً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3364 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"If you bury something in the ground, have witnesses for it, for the earth will not return anything to you."
